---
name: Project Question
about: Ask a reproducible technical question for VRP/EVRP project
title: "[Question] "
labels: [question]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

What are you trying to achieve?

## Instance and constraints

Describe instance size, time windows, capacity, battery, and other constraints.

## Command / Script

Paste exact command and parameters.

## Expected vs Actual

What did you expect and what happened?

## Output / Error log

Paste objective, feasibility status, and errors.

## What you tried

List debugging attempts.

## Attachments

Logs, configs, plots, screenshots, demo clips.
